macro.intro: The macroeconomic environment is characterized by rising inflation with CPI YoY at 330.29%, up from 327.46%. The 10Y TIPS Real Yield has slightly decreased to 1.92%, indicating a cautious outlook on real returns. The Fed Funds Rate remains steady at 3.64%, with no major economic events scheduled today. Geopolitical tensions, particularly the Iran conflict, are impacting market sentiment.

setups.name: WTI Crude Oil Geopolitical Tension Play
setups.rationale: WTI Crude Oil is trading at $82.30, driven by ongoing geopolitical tensions in Iran. The 10Y-2Y Yield Spread at 0.5% suggests a stable economic outlook, supporting oil demand. No major economic events today to disrupt this trend.

metrics.label: Fear & Greed Index
metrics.text: Not available, but geopolitical risk high

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Resolution in Iran could drop prices below $79.00

setups.hedge: Consider shorting EUR/USD at 1.0950 if oil drops below $79.00.

setups.name: S&P 500 Overbought Correction
setups.rationale: The S&P 500 is at 4450.00, recovering from Iran war losses. With no major economic events today, the index may face resistance. Unemployment Rate at 4.3% suggests labor market strength, but geopolitical risks remain.

metrics.label: Fear & Greed Index
metrics.text: Not available, but geopolitical risk high

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Break above 4480.00 could trigger further gains

setups.hedge: Consider long VIX at 18.50 if S&P 500 breaks above 4480.00.

setups.name: EUR/USD Geopolitical Relief Rally
setups.rationale: EUR/USD is trading at 1.0950, benefiting from a weaker dollar as hopes for US-Iran talks rise. The Fed Funds Rate remains at 3.64%, providing a stable backdrop for the euro.

metrics.label: Fear & Greed Index
metrics.text: Not available, but geopolitical risk high

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Dollar strength could push EUR/USD below 1.0900

setups.hedge: Consider shorting Gold at $1980.50 if EUR/USD drops below 1.0900.

contrarian.body: Gold is trading at $1980.50, with potential downside as US-Iran negotiations progress. The 10Y TIPS Real Yield at 1.92% suggests limited inflationary pressure, reducing gold's appeal.
contrarian.warning: Geopolitical tensions remain high. Unexpected escalation could drive gold prices higher, breaching the $2000.00 stop level.

avoid.reason: Earnings report pending, high volatility expected
Brand refresh news, potential market reaction
Regulatory changes due to Iran war sentiment
Hermes, Kering affected by Iran conflict
US sanctions on Iran impacting trade
Controversy over facial recognition in smart glasses
